scenarios.subflow: Shelf life of a specific product
scenarios.text: What is the shelf life of your Kaju Katli?
scenarios.expectedDecision: Product-care route. Product-specific shelf life needs confirmed source facts.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use source data if exact product shelf life is needed; do not invent shelf life.

scenarios.text: Do I need to keep your Motichoor Ladoo in the fridge?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use confirmed product/source guidance for product-specific storage.

scenarios.text: Can I carry Kaju Katli on a train to Pune tomorrow?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Ask/source product and travel facts; do not guarantee travel survival.

scenarios.text: Do you deliver to pincode 400050?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Confirm only from current delivery/source data.

scenarios.text: Can this be delivered tomorrow evening to 400050?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use current delivery/source data; no ETA promise from memory.

scenarios.text: How many pieces come in the Kaju Katli box?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use confirmed product/variant source data.

scenarios.text: Can I get a smaller box with 12 pieces instead?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Offer confirmed variants or route feasibility; no custom-pack promise.

scenarios.text: Do you have anything sugar-free or diabetic friendly?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use confirmed source facts; no medical assurance.

scenarios.text: Does your Kaju Katli contain cashew or dairy?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use confirmed KB/source facts; route uncertainty.

scenarios.subflow: Ingredients/Nutritional Values not listed on packaging
scenarios.text: The ingredients are not listed on my box. Can you share the nutritional values?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use confirmed source or route to team; ask product/batch only if needed.

scenarios.text: My discount code BSSDIWALI20 is not applying.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Validate current code/source; do not invent validity.

scenarios.subflow: Discount won't apply in time / missed window
scenarios.text: The offer ends today but I need delivery next week. Can I still use the discount?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use current offer and delivery rules; route edge cases.

scenarios.text: Birthday gift for my friend under Rs 500. What should I buy?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Product search only when current shortlist is needed.

scenarios.text: This is for a roka ceremony. Need something special under Rs 900.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Search products only for current recommendations.

scenarios.text: I want 30 wedding hampers for next month in Mumbai.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Avoid broad fanout; capture brief and route.

scenarios.text: Baby announcement gifting, about 40 boxes.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: No product search unless examples are requested.

scenarios.text: Need 11 boxes for a haldi under Rs 800 each.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Product search only if current shortlist is useful.

scenarios.text: Corporate gifting around 100 units. Need prices.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: No Shopify/CRM fanout unless product examples or prior context are needed.

scenarios.subflow: Bulk order + GST invoice + logo branding
scenarios.text: Need 80 employee gifts with GST invoice and logo branding.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Capture brief; no GST/branding feasibility promise.

scenarios.text: I wanted to add a customised message to the gift box.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Source/team confirmation; no loose checkout claims.

scenarios.text: Can I customise a box with our logo?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Ask quantity if missing and route feasibility.

scenarios.subflow: Pincode not serviceable / same-day not showing
scenarios.text: Same day delivery is not showing for my pincode 400050.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use delivery/source data if diagnosing availability.

scenarios.subflow: Payment failing / order not going through
scenarios.text: My payment keeps failing and I cannot place the order.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Ask method/error once; no sensitive payment data.

scenarios.text: Where is my order? Can you check the ETA?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use verified order source.

scenarios.text: The tracking link for my order is showing nothing.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Check order source and route abnormal/no update.

scenarios.subflow: Repeat follow-up — order still not received
scenarios.text: I followed up earlier but still have not received any update on my order.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Order source if useful; no delivery promise.

scenarios.subflow: Gift order — no invoice / prices visible
scenarios.text: This is a gift order. Please do not send the bill or show prices.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Order source for placed order; no guaranteed note.

scenarios.text: Can you deliver my order this Friday instead?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Route to human; no date promise.

scenarios.text: Can you deliver between 5 and 7 pm?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Route to human; no time-window promise.

scenarios.subflow: Add / remove item from placed order
scenarios.text: Can you add one more Kaju Katli box to my placed order?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Order/source route; no change promise.

scenarios.text: I placed two orders. Can you combine them for one delivery?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Order/source route; no merge promise.

scenarios.text: I placed the order by mistake. Can you cancel it?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Order/source route; no cancellation promise.

scenarios.text: Please cancel my order and refund the amount.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Order/source route; no refund approval promise.

scenarios.text: The product arrived melted and the texture is completely changed.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Ask for useful photo/order context and route.

scenarios.text: The mithai tastes stale and below expectation.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Ask product/order/photo if useful and route.

scenarios.text: One item is missing from my hamper.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Order source if needed; no unnecessary photo demand.

scenarios.subflow: Gift card / message card not included
scenarios.text: The gift message card is missing from my order.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Order source if needed; route.

scenarios.text: The packaging arrived damaged.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Ask picture and route.

scenarios.text: I received different packaging from what I ordered.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Ask picture/details and route.

scenarios.text: I received a package from you. Can you tell me who sent it?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use order/billing source only; route privacy-sensitive cases.

scenarios.subflow: GST invoice not reflecting correct GST number
scenarios.text: The GST number on my invoice is wrong.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Route/source; no correction promise.

scenarios.subflow: Invoice / bill not included / needed post-delivery
scenarios.text: Can you send me the invoice for my delivered order?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use order/invoice source or route.

scenarios.text: My order says delivered but I have not received it.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Order source if available; urgent route, no delivery promise.

scenarios.text: Can I reserve a table at your Bandra cafe tonight?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use confirmed policy/source; no invented reservation.

scenarios.text: What is your Bandra store address and timing?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use confirmed outlet/source data.

scenarios.subflow: Nearest store to a specific area
scenarios.text: Which is your nearest store to Worli?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use confirmed outlet/source data.

scenarios.text: Can you share the dine-in menu and today's soft serve flavours?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use confirmed menu/source; route live flavour uncertainty.

scenarios.subflow: Parking / valet at a specific outlet
scenarios.text: Is valet available at the cafe?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use confirmed outlet/source data.

scenarios.subflow: Stock / product available at a specific outlet
scenarios.text: Is Kaju Katli available in your Bandra store today?
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use store/source data; do not assume online stock.

scenarios.subflow: Receipt / GST bill for in-store purchase
scenarios.text: I bought from the Bandra store and need my bill.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Capture outlet/time/payment mode and route.

scenarios.text: cheap followers click this link now
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: No MCP/tool use.

scenarios.subflow: Customer opts out of marketing messages
scenarios.text: Please stop sending me promotional messages.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Confirm action only if system/source supports it.

scenarios.text: I already unsubscribed but I am still getting promotional messages.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Acknowledge repeat issue and route.

scenarios.text: I want to open a Bombay Sweet Shop franchise.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use confirmed policy/source; no invented process.

scenarios.text: Are you hiring? I want a job at Bombay Sweet Shop.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use confirmed careers route/source.

scenarios.text: I ordered on Swiggy and the mithai quality was bad.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Do not use Shopify order lookup by default.

scenarios.text: My Zomato order is missing one item.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Ask platform/order/missing item; no Shopify assumption.

scenarios.subflow: Product out of stock or not found on aggregator
scenarios.text: Kaju Katli is not showing on Swiggy in my area.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Use platform/source only if available; no enablement promise.

scenarios.subflow: GST invoice / bill for aggregator order
scenarios.text: I need a bill for my Swiggy order but the platform is not helping.
scenarios.expectedToolPolicy: Redirect only if confirmed; otherwise route with platform details.
